description: Log in to ManageEngine ADAudit Plus using username 'admin' and password 'Admin@2024'. Enable and configure Removable Storage (USB) Auditing for the 'Workstations' OU. The configuration must monitor 'USB Storage Device Connected', 'USB Storage Device Disconnected', and 'File Copied to USB' events. Save a screenshot of the configuration to 'C:\workspace\usb_audit_config_result.png' and create a summary text file at 'C:\workspace\usb_audit_config_summary.txt' with the content 'USB Audit Enabled'.
